dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 15, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**PHILLIES BASH PIRATES 11-9 IN THRILLING SHOWDOWN**

Kyle Schwarber's 5-hit, 2-homer performance paced the Philadelphia Phillies to a 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates. Schwarber's 5 RBIs, including a pair of home runs, helped the Phillies overcome a late Pirates surge. José Alvarado earned the win with a strong 1-inning relief outing, striking out 3 and allowing no runs. Bryce Harper added 3 hits and 2 RBIs for the Phillies.

In other games, the Washington Nationals edged the Baltimore Orioles 3-2 behind Daylen Lile's 3-hit, 2-RBI performance. Lile's home run was one of three hits for the Orioles' Gunnar Henderson, who also drove in a run. Zack Littell earned the win with 5 scoreless innings.

The Detroit Tigers outlasted the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, thanks to Trey Yesavage's 6-inning outing and Andrés Giménez's 2-RBI performance. Spencer Torkelson's 2nd-inning single scored the go-ahead run for the Tigers.

The Cincinnati Reds topped the Cleveland Guardians 7-6 in a back-and-forth affair, with Matt McLain hitting a 3-RBI home run to help the Reds pull ahead. Pierce Johnson earned the win with a scoreless inning of relief.

The Tampa Bay Rays blanked the Miami Marlins 7-2, led by Cedric Mullins' 4-hit performance, including a home run. Jesse Scholtens earned the win with 5 scoreless innings.

The Milwaukee Brewers edged the Minnesota Twins 3-2, thanks to Joe Ryan's 6-inning outing and Jake Bauers' 2-hit performance. Bauers' double drove in the go-ahead run for the Brewers.

The Atlanta Braves topped the Boston Red Sox 3-2, with Connelly Early earning the win with 5 scoreless innings. Drake Baldwin's 2-hit performance, including a home run, helped the Braves pull ahead.

The New York Yankees outslugged the New York Mets 5-2, led by Ben Rice's 3-hit performance, including a home run. Cam Schlittler earned the win with 6.2 scoreless innings.

The Chicago Cubs crushed the Chicago White Sox 10-5, led by Carson Kelly's 3-hit performance, including 4 RBIs. Trent Thornton earned the win with 2 scoreless innings of relief.

The Houston Astros blanked the Texas Rangers 2-0, thanks to Spencer Arrighetti's 7.1-inning outing and Isaac Paredes' home run. Arrighetti earned the win with 5 strikeouts.

The St. Louis Cardinals outlasted the Kansas City Royals 5-4, thanks to Lucas Erceg's 1-inning outing and Jordan Walker's 3-hit performance, including a home run. Gordon Graceffo earned the win with a scoreless inning of relief.

The Arizona Diamondbacks dominated the Colorado Rockies 9-1, led by Merrill Kelly's 9-inning outing and Hunter Goodman's home run. Kelly earned the win with 3 strikeouts.

The Los Angeles Dodgers blanked the Los Angeles Angels 6-0, thanks to Edgardo Henriquez's 1-inning outing and Andy Pages' 3-RBI performance. Pages' home run helped the Dodgers pull ahead.

The San Diego Padres edged the Seattle Mariners 2-0, thanks to Emerson Hancock's 6-inning outing and Miguel Andujar's 2-hit performance. Hancock earned the win with 6 strikeouts.

The Oakland Athletics outlasted the San Francisco Giants 5-2, thanks to Aaron Civale's 5-inning outing and Luis Arraez's 4-hit performance, including a home run. Civale earned the win with 6 strikeouts.
